title: Synthetic Business Cycle vs Shi-Xi-Xie's Germany.R method (West German reunification)
paper: Shi, Zhentao, Yishen Xi & Jin Xie (2025), "A Synthetic Business Cycle Approach to Counterfactual Analysis with Nonstationary Macroeconomic Data," arXiv:2505.22388; Section 5.1
reference_impl: Shi-Xi-Xie SBC method (Germany.R detrending + Synth::synth ipop, independent R run)
